x-enumeration-literals.name: Lifecycle
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the progression state of a product, arrangement, transaction, case, or servicing activity throughout its business lifecycle from initiation to closure or termination.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the financial position, available funds, outstanding obligations, or monetary standing associated with a product arrangement or account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the allocation, consumption, availability, breach, or utilization condition of authorized operational, financial, or risk exposure limits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Amount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the progression, accumulation, settlement, disbursement, repayment, or fulfillment of specific monetary amounts associated with a business process or financial obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: WorkStep
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the execution progress, completion state, sequencing, or operational status of workflow tasks, activities, process steps, or servicing actions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fulfillment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the completion, delivery, provisioning, activation, or servicing progress of a requested product, instruction, order, or customer service outcome.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the clearing, reconciliation, confirmation, and final settlement status of financial transactions, obligations, or payment exchanges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks adherence to regulatory, policy, legal, risk, audit, KYC, AML, or governance requirements and associated control states.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks abnormal, failed, escalated, suspended, breached, or unresolved business or operational conditions requiring remediation or investigation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the consumption, utilization frequency, service access, transaction activity, or resource usage associated with a product or service arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks qualification, entitlement, approval readiness, or criteria satisfaction for accessing products, services, transactions, or operational capabilities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks approval, consent, permission, authentication, or delegated authority states governing execution rights or access permissions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks assessed exposure, risk condition, rating, threshold breach, or risk evaluation state associated with a customer, product, transaction, or operational process.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks operational efficiency, SLA adherence, throughput, responsiveness, productivity, or service quality conditions for processes or servicing activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capacity
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks resource availability, allocation, utilization saturation, operational bandwidth, or processing capability conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks document preparation, submission, validation, approval, expiration, or verification status associated with servicing or compliance processes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks identity, account, transaction, data, or instruction verification states including validation outcomes and confirmation progress.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks fraud assessment, detection, investigation, monitoring, or fraud mitigation states associated with transactions or customer activity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collection
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks delinquency recovery, repayment follow-up, collection actions, recovery progression, or debt remediation activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks valuation, perfection, eligibility, release, substitution, monitoring, or enforcement status of pledged collateral assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dispute
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks investigation, resolution, escalation, adjudication, or closure progress for disputed transactions, claims, or servicing issues.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provisioning
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks technical or operational setup, configuration, enablement, onboarding, or activation progress for products or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Migration
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks conversion, transfer, onboarding, transition, or portfolio migration progress between systems, products, or operational environments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks ongoing observation, surveillance, health assessment, threshold evaluation, or operational supervision conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recovery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks restoration, remediation, fallback, continuity, or operational recovery progression following disruptions or failures.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks matching, balancing, verification, discrepancy resolution, and consistency validation across financial or operational records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks pricing determination, adjustment, approval, eligibility, or application states associated with products, offers, or transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InvestmentPosition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks valuation, exposure, holding condition, market position, or investment portfolio status for treasury or wealth management activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks funding availability, liquidity coverage, cash positioning, liquidity utilization, or short-term funding conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditExposure
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks current and projected exposure conditions associated with lending, counterparty, or credit-related financial obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CaseResolution
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks investigation, handling, escalation, decisioning, and closure progression for operational or customer service cases.
